Heavily driven by global terror regarding massive radioactive fallout, it fundamentally marked the absolute, first massive step in global nuclear arms control during the incredibly tense Cold War.

## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On August 5, 1991, Leila Seth, a massive, incredibly brilliant, and highly distinguished Indian jurist, achieved an absolute, historic legal milestone. She was officially and aggressively appointed as the Chief Justice of the Himachal Pradesh High Court. This massive elevation made her the absolute, very first woman in the massive history of the independent Indian republic to fiercely become the Chief Justice of a state High Court, heavily breaking massive, deeply entrenched patriarchal barriers within the massive Indian judiciary system.

On August 5, 1905, the massive, incredibly historic, and deeply defining Boycott Resolution was officially and aggressively adopted at a massive public meeting in the Calcutta Town Hall. Fiercely championed by massive nationalist leaders in absolute retaliation against Lord Curzon's horrific Partition of Bengal, the resolution aggressively mandated the absolute boycott of British goods. This incredibly massive event fundamentally and officially launched the massive *Swadeshi* movement, fiercely transforming the Indian struggle into an absolute, subcontinent-wide mass economic and political revolution.
